ticker: Senate vote on spending bill postponed — 3rd delay this month
DOJ investigation update: no charges filed after 14 months
47 EPA rules reversed — only 6 received major coverage
Immigration court backlog hits record 3.7M pending cases
247 lifetime judicial appointments confirmed — most in a decade
Federal Reserve confirmation hearing rescheduled for 4th time
State AGs file joint lawsuit over rollbacks — 34 states joined

major_stories.title: Federal Judiciary Reshaping: 247 Lifetime Appointments
major_stories.summary: Individual judge confirmations rarely make headlines. Cumulatively, they represent the most consequential long-term shift in American governance.
major_stories.analysis: 247 lifetime appointments shift ideological balance of federal circuits for 30–40 years. Each confirmation generated 1.4 days of coverage on average.

major_stories.title: Voting Infrastructure Under Legislative Pressure in 28 States
major_stories.summary: Since 2021, over 28 states have enacted restrictions on mail-in ballot access. Each bill is reported in isolation. The cumulative picture is never assembled.

timeline.event: Georgia SB 441 restricts drop box locations
Federal appeals court upholds AZ signature rules

major_stories.analysis: Drop box counts reduced 41% on average in affected counties. Ballot request windows shortened by 18 days. Coverage per bill: 1.2 days.

major_stories.title: Immigration Court Backlog Reaches 3.7 Million Cases
major_stories.summary: Every week brings new executive actions and rhetoric. The operational reality — an immigration court system at total collapse — is rarely the lead story.

timeline.event: Record 3.7M pending cases — EOIR funding denied

major_stories.analysis: Policy rhetoric and actual enforcement are inversely correlated. Average case wait time: 4.3 years. Coverage focused 94% on announcements, 6% on outcomes.

fading_stories.title: Special Counsel Investigation Into Campaign Finance
fading_stories.description: Launched with major press attention. 14 months later, no charges filed, no public updates from DOJ. Coverage dropped 94% after week 3.

fading_stories.title: Executive Order on Federal Contractor Wages
fading_stories.description: Signed with fanfare, implementation delayed four times. Legal challenges stalled in district court. No final rule published.

fading_stories.title: Congressional Oversight Hearings on AI in Government
fading_stories.description: Report due to Congress was promised for Q3 2025. Now 6 months overdue. No hearing scheduled. The story generated 3 days of coverage then vanished.

fading_stories.title: Senate Spending Bill — 3rd Postponement This Month
fading_stories.description: Each postponement generates a news cycle. The structural deadlock — a 6-senator hold bloc — has never been the story. Vote now 90 days overdue.

outcomes.title: 34 AGs File Joint Suit Against EPA Rollback Rules
outcomes.description: After 41 environmental rules were reversed with minimal press coverage, state attorneys general coordinated a multistate challenge citing APA violations.
outcomes.result: Case filed Feb 2026 in D.C. Circuit. Preliminary injunction granted on 3 of 41 rules. Trial date set for Oct 2026.

outcomes.title: SECURE Elections Act Amendment Passes Committee
outcomes.description: After 3 years of voting rights advocacy and 28-state legislative action, a federal response cleared committee on a bipartisan 9-4 vote.
outcomes.result: Passed Senate Judiciary Committee Mar 14. Floor vote pending. Would restore federal drop box standards in 28 states.

outcomes.title: CFPB Finalizes Medical Debt Credit Reporting Rule
outcomes.description: A 2023 proposal that generated 2 days of coverage and was assumed dead quietly finalized after a 14-month comment period. Takes effect June 2026.
outcomes.result: Final rule published Federal Register Feb 28. Removes medical debt from credit reports for ~15M Americans.

narratives.title: "Voter fraud is rampant in mail-in ballots"
narratives.description: Claim cited in 28 state bills. AI fact-check: documented fraud rate is 0.00004% of ballots cast per Stanford/MIT 2024 study. Narrative spread has increased 340% since 2020.

narratives.title: "Tariffs are protecting American manufacturing jobs"
narratives.description: Claim appears in 54 official announcements. Bureau of Labor Statistics data shows manufacturing employment in tariff-affected sectors down 2.1% since 2022.

narratives.title: "Judicial appointments are routine Senate business"
narratives.description: Framing used to minimize coverage of 247 confirmations. Historically, the average Senate confirmed 50 judges/year. Current pace is 4.9x that average.

narratives.title: "Strict enforcement has reduced border crossings significantly"
narratives.description: Claim peaked in late 2025 coverage. CBP data shows encounters declined but are attributable to seasonal patterns consistent with pre-2021 trends.
